title: Bundle Crafting Backport
description: Backports the new bundle recipe (1 leather + 1 string) to 1.20.1
body:
This project backports the lodestone tweaks from version 1.21.5:
* **Cheaper Recipe**: 1 Leather + 1 String = 1 Bundle
* **Updated Recipe Unlock**: The recipe is now unlocked when you obtain leather or string
